codeReview.summary: The feature implementation covers the Recover flow requirements end-to-end: dashboard entry, collect-shares screen, success screen interactions (copy/reveal/clear), routing, and Back to Signer navigation on both screens. The commit is aligned with the feature description and validation contract assertions for VAL-RECOVER-001 through VAL-RECOVER-005.

summary: PASS — recover-flow is implemented as specified, transcript skeleton and commit diff were reviewed, and no high-confidence actionable issues were found.
